title: Tectaria cuspidatopinnata
taxonomy: Tectaria cuspidatopinnata is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It belongs to the genus Tectaria and the order Polypodiales. The family Dryopteridaceae is a group of ferns that are characterized by their simple leaves and various reproductive structures. The genus Tectaria is a group of ferns that are often found in tropical and subtropical regions. Tectaria cuspidatopinnata is a specific species within this genus and family, with its classification providing insight into its evolutionary relationships and characteristics.
